offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of delivery logs with driver timesheets
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
